2603.25681.title: Self-Improvement of Large Language Models: A Technical Overview and Future Outlook
2603.25681.paper_summary: As large language models (LLMs) continue to advance, improving them solely through human supervision is becoming increasingly costly and limited in scalability. As models approach human-level capabilities in certain domains, human feedback may no longer provide sufficiently informative signals for further improvement. At the same time, the growing ability of models to make autonomous decisions and execute complex actions naturally enables abstractions in which components of the model development process can be progressively automated. Together, these challenges and opportunities have driven increasing interest in self-improvement, where models autonomously generate data, evaluate outputs, and iteratively refine their own capabilities. In this paper, we present a system-level perspective on self-improving language models and introduce a unified framework that organizes existing techniques. We conceptualize the self-improvement system as a closed-loop lifecycle, consisting of four tightly coupled processes: data acquisition, data selection, model optimization, and inference refinement, along with an autonomous evaluation layer. Within this framework, the model itself plays a central role in driving each stage: collecting or generating data, selecting informative signals, updating its parameters, and refining outputs, while the autonomous evaluation layer continuously monitors progress and guides the improvement cycle across stages. Following this lifecycle perspective, we systematically review and analyze representative methods for each component from a technical standpoint. We further discuss current limitations and outline our vision for future research toward fully self-improving LLMs.
2603.25681.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）的持續進步，僅通過人類監督來改善它們變得越來越昂貴且在可擴展性上受到限制。當模型在某些領域接近人類水平的能力時，人類反饋可能不再提供足夠有用的信號以進一步改善。與此同時，模型自主做出決策和執行複雜行動的能力日益增強，自然促進了模型開發過程中各組件的逐步自動化。這些挑戰和機會共同驅動了對自我改善日益增長的興趣，在這種情況下，模型自主生成數據、評估輸出並迭代地完善其自身能力。本文中，我們從系統層面探討自我改善的語言模型，並介紹一個統一框架來組織現有技術。我們將自我改善系統概念化為一個閉環生命周期，由四個緊密耦合的過程組成：數據獲取、數據選擇、模型優化和推理精煉，還有一個自主評估層。在這個框架內，模型本身在推動每個階段中扮演著核心角色：收集或生成數據、選擇有用的信號、更新其參數和精煉輸出，而自主評估層則持續監控進展並指導各階段的改進循環。根據這一生命周期的視角，我們系統地回顧和分析每個組件的代表性方法，並從技術角度進行探討。我們還討論了當前的限制，並概述了我們對未來研究的願景，旨在實現完全自我改善的LLMs。
2603.25681.author: Haoyan Yang et.al.
2603.25681.authors: Haoyan Yang, Mario Xerri, Solha Park, Huajian Zhang, Yiyang Feng, Sai Akhil Kogilathota, Jiawei Zhou
